title: Fill CLAUDE.md Build & Test section with real flutter commands
description: Once the Flutter project exists, replace the Build & Test placeholder in CLAUDE.md with actual commands: flutter pub get, flutter analyze, flutter test, flutter run -d chrome, platform builds.

title: Bristol type 1-7 SVG icon set
description: Create 7 representative SVG icons, one per Bristol Stool Chart type (1: separate hard lumps ... 7: liquid). These are the primary entry-classification UI element. Include semantic labels for accessibility.

title: go_router shell + bottom nav (Home/Reports/Settings)
description: go_router with a StatefulShellRoute bottom nav: Home, Reports, Settings. Themed empty placeholder screens for each.

title: Theme system + design tokens
description: Dark navy + green accent theme matching Huckleberry visual language (see designs/DESIGN.md reference findings), plus a light variant. Centralize colors/spacing/typography as design tokens.

title: Folder structure + analysis_options lints
description: Set up lib/ folder structure: data/ domain/ features/ ui/. Configure analysis_options.yaml with flutter_lints (or stricter).

title: flutter create: init project with android/ios/web + Flutter .gitignore
description: Run flutter create for DejaPoo enabling android, ios, web platforms. Merge standard Flutter .gitignore entries into the existing repo .gitignore (keep the beads and personal-reference-data sections).

title: Phase 2: Logging UX (MVP loop)
description: Home screen with today-at-a-glance + reverse-chronological timeline. Add/Edit bottom sheet cloning Huckleberry pattern: scrolling Bristol icon circles 1-7 as primary selector, date/time picker defaulting to now, optional detail rows (size, color, urgency/strain, blood, note), big Save. Swipe to edit/delete. FAB long-press quick-log. See designs/DESIGN.md Phase 2.
acceptance_criteria: An entry can be logged in under 5 seconds; full CRUD works on all platforms.

title: Phase 1: Data layer (Drift schema, repos, aggregations)
description: Drift schema + migrations for BowelMovement (uuid, occurredAt, dateOnly flag, bristolType 1-7, optional details, createdAt/updatedAt/deletedAt for sync); repository layer; fixture generator modeled on real spreadsheet distributions; unit tests for CRUD and date-range aggregation queries (count per type per day/week/month, avg/day, streaks/gaps). See designs/DESIGN.md Phase 1.
acceptance_criteria: Repository tests green, including web (WASM sqlite) smoke test.

title: Phase 0: Scaffold & design foundation
description: Stand up the Flutter project and design foundation for DejaPoo. flutter create with android/ios/web; folder structure (data/domain/features/ui); lints; theme system (dark navy + green accent, light variant); design tokens; go_router shell with bottom nav (Home/Reports/Settings); Bristol type 1-7 SVG icon set. See designs/DESIGN.md Phase 0.
acceptance_criteria: App builds and runs on Android, iOS, and web with themed empty screens.

title: Phase 5: Google Drive sync & export
description: Google sign-in; sync via JSON snapshot in Drive appDataFolder (per-record last-write-wins on updatedAt, tombstones for deletes); manual Sync now + auto-sync on app open/entry save; CSV/XLSX export (matching original spreadsheet layout) to Drive folder or share sheet. Needs Google Cloud OAuth client per platform (user-side setup). See designs/DESIGN.md Phase 5.
acceptance_criteria: Two devices converge after concurrent edits; exported XLSX round-trips through the Phase 4 importer.

title: Phase 4: Historical spreadsheet import
description: Importer for the existing year-sheet layout (XLSX and CSV): date rows + Type 1-7 count columns, expands counts into dateOnly events, marks them imported, dedupes on re-import. Tests use a synthetic fixture mimicking the layout (real xlsx is gitignored, used for local manual check). See designs/DESIGN.md Phase 4.
acceptance_criteria: Real Alex Bowels.xlsx imports cleanly locally; Reports reproduce the spreadsheet year totals (669/791/418) and avg-per-day figures.

title: Phase 3: Metrics & reports
description: Reports screen with Day/Week/Month/Year/Custom range selector. Stat tiles (total, avg/day, most common type, pct in healthy range 3-5, longest gap), stacked bar chart of counts by type over time, type-distribution donut, filterable List view. Computed via Phase 1 aggregation queries. See designs/DESIGN.md Phase 3.
acceptance_criteria: Every range renders correct numbers against fixture data, verified by tests.

title: Phase 6: Polish & release readiness
description: Optional daily reminder notifications, app icon/splash, responsive wide-screen web layout + PWA manifest, accessibility pass (semantics on icon picker), empty/error/loading states, release builds, store listing prep. See designs/DESIGN.md Phase 6.
acceptance_criteria: Installable release artifacts for all three platforms.
